## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, performance, and upcoming strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Backlog:** 7 articles await review (4 from prior weeks, 3 new), including a high-priority "Cost by State" piece.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [**Performance:** Strong growth since Sep 8 (nearly 12k impressions), driven by case analysis (e.g., Philips) and high-engagement SEO content (e.g., "AI prompting for lawyers").](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Build a "chronology" content cluster to leverage existing top-ranking content and boost domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Actions:** Kellie to deliver the Demand Letter Editor video today and review all 7 articles; Matt to send the "Cost by State" draft for review.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance & Reporting

  - [**Overall Growth:** Since Sep 8, impressions are nearly at 12,000, with a consistent upward trend in clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [**Top-Performing Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**Case Analysis:** The Philips case piece is a major driver of traffic and authority.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
      - [**SEO Plays:** High engagement on "AI prompting for lawyers" and "AI vs. traditional" articles confirms the strategy is working.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=591.0)
      - **Keyword Wins:** Tavrn now ranks \#1 for a key Nevada-related search term.
  - [**LLM Visibility (Scrunch):**](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Signal:** Tavrn's visibility is rising against competitors (e.g., Upgrade, File Vine) since October.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Context:** This metric is a directional signal, not a definitive one, due to the "Wild West" nature of LLM tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Content Pipeline & Reviews

          - [**"Chronology":** Leverages an existing top-ranking topic.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

  - [**Production Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**New Case Analysis:** A high-volume case is now in production.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [**Birth Injury Cases:** Awaiting approval from Kellie and Pedro.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [**Thanksgiving Cadence:** Publishing will continue as scheduled to maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Upcoming Strategy: Chronology Cluster

  - [**Rationale:** To leverage existing top-ranking content on "chronology" and further build domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Action:** Matt will create new titles for this cluster and share them with Kellie for review.](https://fathom.video/share/x4bqiGnbmdHwyTP21goyyGV8SjVgn5Zc?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
